
;;;; Test basic subtraction functionality
;;;; This checks that subtracting (b c) from (a b c d) correctly returns (a d).
  !(assertEqual 
    (subtraction 
      (superpose (a b c d)) 
      (superpose (b c))) 
    (superpose (a d)))

[

;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.SUBTRACTION-TEST.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.052 secs. (52.37 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqual 
    (subtraction 
      (superpose (a b c d)) 
      (superpose (b c))) 
    (superpose (a d)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (a d) 
      (a d)))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_14888))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqual 
          (subtraction 
            (superpose (a b c d)) 
            (superpose (b c))) 
          (superpose (a d))) $_3372) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3828) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3372 $_3856) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3130) $_3856)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_14888))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqual 
          (subtraction 
            (superpose (a b c d)) 
            (superpose (b c))) 
          (superpose (a d))) $_3372) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3828) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3372 $_3856) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3130) $_3856)))))
